shadowSentences: I enjoy reading books in my free time.
My favorite season is autumn every year.
I love going for long walks in the park.
Cooking new recipes is a fun activity for me.
Traveling to new places always excites me.
I usually spend my weekends with my family.
Listening to music helps me relax after a busy day.
I often watch movies with friends on Friday nights.
Volunteering in my community brings me a lot of joy.
Learning a new language can be challenging but rewarding.
interviewQuestions: What is your favorite way to spend a weekend?
Can you describe your hometown and what you like about it?
What hobbies do you enjoy in your free time?
What is your favorite movie, and why do you like it?
How do you stay organized with your schoolwork?
Who has been a significant influence in your life?
What do you enjoy most about your daily routine?
How do you like to celebrate special occasions?
What is one skill you wish to learn and why?
What type of music do you prefer, and how does it affect you?
Can you tell me about a memorable trip you have taken?
What is your opinion on social media and its impact on society?
